title: Quick Socket Chat Test - 5 Minutes

instructions.title: Select Same Chat
instructions.action: In both tabs, click 'Speedy Chow' / 'provider_001' chat

instructions.title: Send Message
instructions.action: Provider tab: Type 'Hello' and press Enter
instructions.check: Message appears in Provider (right, cyan) AND User tab (left, gray) INSTANTLY

instructions.title: Reply Message
instructions.action: User tab: Type 'Hi there' and press Enter
instructions.check: Message appears in User tab (right, cyan) AND Provider tab (left, gray) INSTANTLY

instructions.title: Test Typing Indicator
instructions.action: Provider tab: Start typing but DON'T send
instructions.check: User tab shows animated 3 dots in messages area

instructions.title: Verify Database
instructions.check: All messages saved with correct chatId, senderId, message text

expected_results.test_passed: Messages appear instantly in both windows with correct styling and typing indicator works
test_failed: Check browser console (F12) for error messages
Verify socket is connected: '[Socket] Connected' log
Ensure both tabs are on same chat

console_logs_to_see: [v0] Displaying message for current chat: provider_001
if_messages_dont_show: Check console for errors (red text in F12)
Verify chatId matches - should see 'provider_001' in logs
Make sure you selected the same chat in both windows
Check network tab - is 'send-message' event being sent?
Try refreshing both pages and selecting chat again
if_typing_indicator_not_showing: Make sure other window is focused on same chat
Check console for 'Showing typing indicator' log
Type slowly to ensure input event fires
